# [Bug] Verify ai:syncKnowledgeBase.mjs behavior

### Summary
During the refactoring of the orchestrator daemon in #11044, an issue was observed with the `ai:syncKnowledgeBase.mjs` script. It appears to be unrelated to the Orchestrator extraction itself but needs to be investigated and resolved to ensure Knowledge Base synchronization works correctly.

### Context
- Discovered during manual boot-testing of the orchestrator daemon in #11044.
- Originating PR: #11044.

### Acceptance Criteria
1. Investigate the failure or warning in `ai:syncKnowledgeBase.mjs`.
2. Fix the underlying issue.
3. Verify successful execution of the KB sync process.
